title: Rankett admin todo list — SaaS pivot, intake, queries
html:
Rankett working punchlist Yahir wrote against the in-progress tool: get into Admin view so Diddles can see, swap demo domain acme.com → rankett.com, call Diddles about the "$100/mo SaaS pivot," implement new quiz questions, add a pentagon vector graph to overview, finalize the intake form + customer CRM, fix the logo (maybe via Nano Banana), and rewrite the "fucking horrible, slightly retarded" queries. Loading screen shows "Analyzed ChatGPT responses / Analyzed Claude responses / Calculating ROI impact."

TL;DR

  • Live punchlist captures the moment Rankett is debating a $100/mo SaaS tier alongside the agency white-label.
  • Pentagon vector graph + intake-form + CRM are the missing UX pieces for the agency portal.
  • Loading screen confirms the engine runs across ChatGPT and Claude as primary providers.

rankett · diddles · ai visibility engine · chatgpt · anthropic claude · nano banana
